{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202840D599C5CEEBDD43DD1758"}"},"total":2780},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7262857870882210594","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这种文真的好喜欢，可以算是这段时间我最喜欢的一本小说了，说实话，我想去二刷一遍，除了有一点点恐怖让我吓得一晚上没睡着之外，没有任何问题，还有不是说恐怖不好，这样就挺好的，这本书真的好好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691016005,"group_id":"7230804833635142711","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"每日发疯 更新不定 ⸜₍๑•⌔•๑₎⸝","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwfyrNNrxPvw2HYEBESHBaw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/da5d57495983490e91b4329191523003~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795657&x-signature=rjrkScQC9BAWsewAkL8pzzUHFoo%3D","user_id":"874816523993128","user_name":"馄饨不好吃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"874816523993128","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7230804833635142711","book_info":{"abstract":"（变身、不嫁人、悬疑推理、诡异、半无敌）
       秦韵沾染了古镜中的邪物，变成了一个女鬼。
　　而这女鬼非常言道的厉鬼，是一种极其诡异、强大的未知生命。
　　恰逢规则怪谈游戏降临，秦韵成为龙国天选者，代表龙国挑战规则怪谈。
　　挑战失败的国家怪谈会降临到此国家上。
　　怪谈中到处都是诡异、邪灵，各国选手只能在夹缝中垂死挣扎。
　　“搞什么！我们龙国天选者怎么是一个弱不禁风的女孩子？”
　　“完了，天要亡我龙国啊！”
　　然而，危险来临时……
　　秦韵褪去表象，化身女鬼，怪谈这才意识到拉进了什么不得了的东西。
　　诡异、邪灵瑟瑟发抖：“我不当诡异了，她才是诡异！不要过来啊！”
　　各国一片哀嚎：“你确定龙国天选者是人？我实名举报！龙国作弊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c9903b1a126d883dd892abbbcdbdc4ba","author":"蒸虾头乌鱼了","author_id":"","book_id":"7230804833635142711","book_name":"诡异恐怖？抱歉，我才是真正女鬼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#803828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7230805016099947008","read_count":"15314","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"556276"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"208","tags":"悬疑脑洞,直播,灵异,无敌,规则怪谈,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7d4f0deb4ecf8050f80b8a1c4fc48b97~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452920&x-signature=QwG5Cx19qx2BH%2FARtCyjD6OXBzM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"84797765885","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.359931e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202840D599C5CEEBDD43DD1758"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,
